_sample.how_mode_is_detected: Use this when garments/og/<id>.jpg exists, garments/og/<id>/ does not exist, and video.enabled is true.
input_files: archetypes.video_model as one model/avatar image for the dedicated video source still
flow: Normalize the single garment image to garments/og/<id>.normalized.jpg.
Generate one dedicated VTO still using archetypes.video_model.
Generate one image-to-video asset from that VTO still.
Build a reel with original garment image, VTO still, generated video, and optional end card.
_sample.cost_note: This mode makes one VTO call and one video-generation call unless outputs already exist.

vto.prompt: virtual try on. show the garment naturally fitted on the model. preserve realistic fabric, garment details, lighting, proportions, and full outfit visibility.

video.prompt: Elegant fashion reel motion. The model makes a subtle runway turn and gentle pose, showing the outfit silhouette. Smooth camera movement, premium editorial style, natural fabric movement.
